creator: ac199@hwcn.org
text:
On Sun, 12 Apr 1998, Brian Handy wrote:

>  Hmmm...where'd it fetch the port from?  I just fetched it from the French
>  site, (#2 in the MASTER_SITES list) and it worked fine.  If we've got

The one on the uwm site is v.0.88.1, but the one on the French
site is v.0.88.  Most of the differences are superficial.  The
port may need to be updated.  Hopefully the French site and the
Japanese site (also at the old version) will quickly mirror the
update.  From the diffs between the two versions, it looks like a
simple update.


--
 tIM...HOEk
OPTIMIZATION: the process of using many one-letter variables names
              hoping that the resultant code will run faster.
